name: Swedberg Golf Academy
address: 4192 Geneva Golf Club Dr, Alexandria, MN 56308
about: Swedberg Golf Academy is a premier teaching and practice facility located at Geneva Golf Club in Alexandria, MN. It offers over 4,500 square feet of space featuring four indoor/outdoor heated hitting bays equipped with Trackman golf simulators, an indoor putting green with a SAM PuttLab, and a club fitting studio. The academy is designed for year-round practice and instruction, providing a professional environment for golfers to develop their skills regardless of weather conditions. With technology such as 240fps cameras and TrackMan launch monitors, lessons are data-driven and tailored to individual player development goals.
why_golfers_like_it: Year-round access to heated bays and premium Trackman simulators
Expert club fitting services using top-tier brands and technology
Personalized instruction with high-speed video analysis and TrackMan data

simulator_hardware.notes: Four Trackman golf simulators installed in bays

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own golf clubs. The academy offers custom club fitting services if you need equipment tailored to your swing.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: There are no food or drink services mentioned on-site. It is not specified if outside food or drinks are permitted.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulator session take?
faq.answer: A standard one-hour simulator session costs $40, which is typically enough time for a partial round or focused practice session.

faq.question: Is the academy kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the academy offers junior golf programs and has instructors dedicated to youth development, making it a suitable environment for young golfers.
